name: Tuscaloosa
content:
Tuscaloosa is a college town, the former capital of Alabama, and sometimes referred to as Druid City. I lived in Tuscaloosa in the summer of 2025, when a third of the usual population (students) was missing (gone on summer vacation). I imagine the experience while students are in town is quite different. Be wary of drunk teenagers driving oversize mall haulers A mall hauler is a pickup truck that is in pristine condition and therefore clearly not actually used as a pickup truck. during any time of the year.
Occasionally an inebriated adolescent white boy will try to get smart and attempt to hurl an insult at you. Fortunately for you, the insult hurler is typically inebriated, adolescent, white, and therefore lacking in both creativity and vocal projection. I have had to ask insult-hurlers to speak up because I couldn’t hear them (they repeated themselves and I still couldn’t hear them because they took the muffler off their car), in other instances the supposed insult simply failed to be insulting. I have yet to be successfully insulted by someone in Tuscaloosa. When I first moved to Alabama, I thought I would get the chance to fend off insults and sharpen my wit. I was sorely disappointed. If you get the chance, maybe try workshopping some better insults with whoever tries insulting you? I really would like to have some better insults to respond to. The Black Warrior river runs alongside Tuscaloosa.
